alkylation reagent: addition of 200 µl of a 55 mM chloroacetamide solution
alkylation concentration: 200 µl of a 55 mM chloroacetamide solution
cleavage agent: A 0.2 µg µl−1 stock solution of trypsin (Promega, V511A)
collision energy: fragmentation was triggered by high-energy collision dissociation in fixed collision energy mode with fixed collision energy of 34%
enrichment method: loaded onto 100 μl Strep-Tactin XT resin (Cytiva)
fragmentation method: fragmentation was triggered by high-energy collision dissociation
instrument: on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: ionized with an electrospray ionization source
labeling: peptides were analyzed by liquid chromatography coupled with tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS)
reduction reagent: addition of 200 µl of a 10 mM DTT solution
reduction concentration: addition of 200 µl of a 10 mM DTT solution
